modes.compact: Fast core scan: tempo, beats, onsets, RMS, centroid, zero crossings, and dynamic range.
modes.playlist: Adds spectral, tonal, and perceptual features for library organization.
modes.full: Playlist analysis plus expensive rhythm curves and time signature.

feature_groups.name: spectral-tonal
feature_groups.meaning: Timbre, harmony, key, chord, and consonance evidence.

feature_groups.name: perceptual-rhythm
feature_groups.meaning: Interpretable perceptual and longer-timescale rhythm estimates.

feature_groups.name: models-and-identity
feature_groups.meaning: Opt-in similarity, learned ranking, vocal, mood, and content-identity outputs.

interpretation.confidence: A confidence or support field describes evidence strength for that estimator; it is not a universal probability of correctness.
interpretation.uncertainty: Retain model/schema versions and requested feature provenance when comparing stored results. Do not compare incompatible versions.
interpretation.abstention: Treat a null estimate as an intentional abstention. In particular, aggression_score is null when content support is insufficient; do not coerce it to zero.
interpretation.batch: analyze_batch preserves input order and isolates per-file failures in error/error_kind records. Progress callback failures never cancel the batch.
interpretation.validation: Interpret a PASS only after offline verification against a separately pinned trust root. A receipt bundled with its own unpinned trust root is not independently trusted.
